<!-- Thanks for contributing to Strata! -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link the issue/finding it addresses. -->

## Type

- [ ] New skill / command
- [ ] New or updated council agent
- [ ] Template / stack pack
- [ ] Docs / reference
- [ ] Fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `bash scripts/validate.sh` passes
- [ ] No private/internal data in any shipped file (templates get copied into other repos)
- [ ] Skill `description` starts with "Use when …" and names concrete triggers
- [ ] Bundled assets referenced via `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}`, not hardcoded paths
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
